title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/03/2025
Today, DCE Iron ore futures gradually strengthened from a weak start, fluctuating upward throughout the day. The most-traded contractI2505 finally closed at 780, with a daily increase of 0.19%. Traders sold goods according to market conditions, while steel mills purchased as needed.
